subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received, and its meanings brought forth added spirit and delight. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه اخیر رسید و معانی سبب مزید روح و ریحان گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @importance of community building, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
